positive: A majestic, stylized owl portrait rendered in a neo-tribal, mystical aesthetic. The owl is centrally composed, perched on a crescent moon against a backdrop of deep, bioluminescent foliage and celestial constellations. Use sharp, high-contrast silhouettes, clean vector lines, and intricate dotwork details. The color palette should be limited to deep midnight blue, emerald green, sapphire blue, and glowing gold accents. The overall composition must be highly symmetrical and suitable for a repeat pattern or single, impactful apparel placement. Ink wash effect, detailed line art illustration, maximum contrast, highly decorative.
negative: blurry, out of focus, low detail, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, jpeg artifacts, noise, messy, gradients, photorealistic, 3d render, ugly
